# SEC-XRP Lawsuit Resolution Clears Regulatory Path | YES | HIGH confidence

The **SEC has dropped its long-running lawsuit against Ripple Labs**, removing a regulatory overhang that has weighed on XRP for nearly half a decade.[1] This resolution, combined with a March 17 SEC-CFTC framework classifying XRP as a digital commodity alongside Bitcoin and Ethereum, has fundamentally shifted market dyna

signals.raw: XRP spot ETF ecosystem now holds approximately $1 billion in combined assets, with $224 million in inflows during the first week of April alone—the largest single-country-led inflow rebound since December.[5]

signals.headline: Price Action & Technical Breakthrough:**
signals.raw:
Price Action & Technical Breakthrough:**
XRP broke above the $1.50 resistance level on April 17 for the first time in 2026, settling near $1.42-$1.47.[1][5] This represents a 10% weekly gain and marks April 2026 as XRP's strongest monthly performance since September 2025.[1]

signals.headline: Market Sentiment Shift:**
signals.raw:
Market Sentiment Shift:**
The critical distinction is that April's rally was **spot-led rather than futures-led**—ETF inflows preceded futures positioning, suggesting institutional rather than leveraged retail demand.[5] This composition matters because spot ETF holdings do not liquidate on leverage unwinds, indicating structural support.
